title: Adventure (Atari 2600) | Arcade
description: The famous videogame Adventure playable in Minecraft!
body:
A recreation of the game Adventure for the Atari Video Computer System or Atari 2600 in 
the form of an arcade machine.

Working level 1 of Adventure with player movement, items enemy dragon and 
a Trophy, for the bravest player.


## RECIPES
Atari 2600
